source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A resistive DC load receives pulse-width modulated (PWM) power from a controller circuit, and an oscilloscope shows the load voltage waveform as such shown in the image. Calculate the duty cycle of this waveform, as shown in the figure. The duty cycle is ______%.

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says the waveform is 'shown in the image'
task depends on reading an oscilloscope waveform rather than text alone
multi_step: requires extracting timing information from the waveform image
requires computing duty cycle from extracted values, typically on-time divided by period times 100
answer_type is numeric and no multiple-choice options are provided, so the result must be derived rather than selected
verifiability: the target quantity is well-defined: duty cycle percentage from a displayed PWM waveform
image_quality_summaries reports readability_score=0.7773, suggesting the waveform may be readable enough for checking
